name: Baby Ruth Cookies
recipeIngredient: 5 Baby Ruth bars, cut into 1.9oz pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, peanut butter, and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs and mix well.
3. Add the vanilla extract.
4. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt).
5. Alternately add the milk to the mixture, stirring gently after each addition.
6. Stir in the cut-up Baby Ruth pieces.
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto buttered cookie sheets.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F until golden brown, about 12-15 minutes.
